## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Affected Components

- [ ] ubuntu-mcp
- [ ] obsidian-mcp
- [ ] synology-mcp
- [ ] mcp-webui
- [ ] permission-engine
- [ ] docs-site
- [ ] CI / infra

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references, or related issues.
